case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. HECTOR ROMO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-14-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
